narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township A (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,103 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.6 percentage points.
